text:
Created attachment 172067
vimage_log

Have 4 vimage jails running on host with ipfilter firewall using bridge/epair. Vimage jails do not have any firewall.
Every thing seems to work as expected except the vt0 system console has message about "DAD detected duplicate IPv6 address". My jails do not use ipv6 at all. Jails do have outbound access to public internet.
